channel.description: Slack channel ID (preferred — `C0123456789`) or name (`#general` — host resolves to ID). IDs are stable across renames; names are not.

workspace.description: When the host's Slack adapter is configured for multiple workspaces, the workspace identifier. Defaults to the host's primary workspace.

asUser.description: Optional user-impersonation identifier — post as a specific user. Requires host-side OAuth flow + chat:write:user scope. When unset, posts as the host's bot user.
